error_signature: two nodes running at the same time
title: Browserflow node shows misleading execution status
symptom: The Browserflow node appears to run simultaneously with another node, causing confusion in the execution log. The editor shows fewer processed items than the actual execution count.
applies_when: Executing a loop with multiple items
root_cause: The issue arises from the UI's live update stream lagging behind the actual execution process. This can lead to a visual representation where multiple nodes seem active simultaneously, despite the backend processing correctly.
fix_steps: Verify the Executions tab for accurate processing counts.
Increase WebSocket/read timeouts in your proxy settings.
Access n8n directly without a proxy to check if the issue persists.
Consider updating n8n to the latest version for potential fixes.
agent_instruction: Check the Executions tab for accurate counts and adjust your proxy settings as needed.
